notes: Hotfix: clicking SETTINGS or ACCOUNT crashed the game (modal panel lookup used wrong API). All other v0.1.5 features intact: main menu, volume/fullscreen/bloom toggle, local nickname, ESC returns to menu, drifting class shapes in menu background.
launcher_notes: Self-update support. From now on the launcher updates itself automatically when a newer build is published. News + classes panels fixed. Steam ID display formatting fixed.
